I want to record what I remember about my grandfather. His name was Robert Miller and he was born in Chicago around 1928.

Robert married a woman named Margaret in 1952. They lived in Chicago their whole lives, except for a few years in Boston in the late sixties.

They had three children: my father David, my aunt Susan, and my uncle Thomas. David was born in 1955, Susan in 1958, and Thomas in 1962.

Margaret died in 2001 from cancer, and Robert passed away three years later in 2004. Both are buried in Chicago.

My father David is still alive — he turned seventy this year.
